mapper.sql: id, notice_type, title, summary, target_url, cover_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `home_notice` (notice_type, title, summary, target_url, cover_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{noticeType}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{targetUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update `home_notice` set notice_type = #{noticeType}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, target_url = #{targetUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update `home_notice` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from `home_notice` where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from `home_notice` order by sort_order asc, id asc
